title: campanula scheuchzeri subsp. kerneri
intro: Campanula scheuchzeri subsp. kerneri, also known as Alpine Campanula, is a perennial plant belonging to the bellflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, due to its content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Alpine Campanula can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
